Input
Argument Name
name: servicenow-query-tickets

outputs.description: The unique ticket identifier Ticket.Creator A string field that indicates the user who created the ticket
outputs.name: Ticket.ID

outputs.description: date The date and time when the ticket was created Ticket.Assignee
outputs.name: Ticket.CreatedOn

outputs.description: Specifies the user assigned to complete the ticket. By default, this field uses a reference qualifier to only display users with the itil role. Ticket.State Status of the ticket
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: A human-readable title for the record Ticket.Number The display value of the ticket
outputs.name: Ticket.Summary

outputs.description: Specifies whether work is still being done on a task or whether the work for the task is complete Ticket.AdditionalComments Comments about the task record
outputs.name: Ticket.Active

outputs.description: Specifies how high a priority the ticket should be for the assignee Ticket.OpenedAt date
outputs.name: Ticket.Priority

outputs.description: Ticket.Escalation Indicates how long the ticket has been open
outputs.name: The date and time when the ticket was opened for the first time
